cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out who Claire ends up with at the end of the dance. So, the problem gives us the initial pairings and then a series of partner swaps. I need to track each swap step by step to make sure I don't get confused. First, the initial partners are: - Alice with Lola - Bob with Izzi - Claire with Sam - Dave with Patrick - Eve with Karl Now, the sequence of partner swaps is as follows: 1. Claire and Bob switch partners. 2. Claire and Alice switch partners. 3. Bob and Claire switch partners. 4. Eve and Bob switch partners. 5. Dave and Claire switch partners. Let me go through each step one by one. Starting with the first swap: Claire and Bob switch partners. So initially, Claire is with Sam, and Bob is with Izzi. After switching, Claire will take Bob's partner Izzi, and Bob will take Claire's partner Sam. So now the pairings are: - Alice with Lola - Bob with Sam - Claire with Izzi - Dave with Patrick - Eve with Karl Second swap: Claire and Alice switch partners. Claire is currently with Izzi, and Alice is with Lola. After swapping, Claire will take Alice's partner Lola, and Alice will take Claire's partner Izzi. The new pairings are: - Alice with Izzi - Bob with Sam - Claire with Lola - Dave with Patrick - Eve with Karl Third swap: Bob and Claire switch partners. Bob is currently with Sam, and Claire is with Lola. After the swap, Bob takes Claire's partner Lola, and Claire takes Bob's partner Sam. Now the pairings are: - Alice with Izzi - Bob with Lola - Claire with Sam - Dave with Patrick - Eve with Karl
